SELECT
          o.checkout_surface,
          pa.rail_type,
          sum(CASE WHEN p.payment_status = 'SUCCESS' THEN p.amount ELSE 0 END) AS tpv
        FROM orders o
        JOIN payments p ON o.order_ref = p.order_ref
        JOIN payment_attributes pa ON p.rail_ref = pa.rail_ref
        WHERE o.checkout_surface = 'mobile_sdk'
        GROUP BY o.checkout_surface, pa.rail_type

SELECT
          o.checkout_surface,
          pa.authentication_mode,
          sum(CASE WHEN p.payment_status = 'SUCCESS' THEN p.amount ELSE 0 END) AS tpv,
          sum(CASE WHEN p.payment_status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS successful_payments,
          count(*) AS total_payments,
          sum(CASE WHEN p.payment_status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::DOUBLE / nullif(count(*), 0) AS psr
        FROM payments p
        JOIN orders o ON p.order_ref = o.order_ref
        JOIN user_attributes ua ON p.user_ref = ua.user_ref
        JOIN users u ON p.user_ref = u.user_ref
        JOIN payment_attributes pa ON p.rail_ref = pa.rail_ref
        WHERE p.payment_time >= TIMESTAMP '2026-03-01'
          AND p.payment_time < TIMESTAMP '2026-04-01'
          AND ua.risk_band = 'low'
          AND ua.state = 'Karnataka'
          AND ua.kyc_status = 'verified'
          AND u.account_state = 'active'
        GROUP BY o.checkout_surface, pa.authentication_mode
        HAVING count(*) >= 5
        ORDER BY tpv DESC

SELECT
          pa.rail_type,
          ua.risk_band,
          sum(CASE WHEN p.payment_status = 'SUCCESS' THEN p.amount ELSE 0 END) AS successful_volume,
          count(*) AS attempts
        FROM payments p
        JOIN payment_attributes pa ON p.rail_ref = pa.rail_ref
        JOIN user_attributes ua ON p.user_ref = ua.user_ref
        WHERE pa.rail_type = 'WALLET'
          AND ua.risk_band = 'low'
        GROUP BY pa.rail_type, ua.risk_band

SELECT
          u.platform_plan,
          ua.gender,
          count(DISTINCT p.user_ref) AS active_users,
          sum(CASE WHEN p.payment_status = 'SUCCESS' THEN p.amount ELSE 0 END) AS tpv
        FROM users u
        JOIN user_attributes ua ON u.user_ref = ua.user_ref
        JOIN payments p ON u.user_ref = p.user_ref
        WHERE ua.gender = 'F'
        GROUP BY u.platform_plan, ua.gender
        ORDER BY tpv DESC

SELECT
          o.product_area,
          count(DISTINCT o.order_ref) AS orders_created,
          count(DISTINCT p.payment_ref) AS payment_attempts,
          count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.payment_status = 'SUCCESS' THEN p.payment_ref END) AS successful_payments
        FROM orders o
        LEFT JOIN payments p ON o.order_ref = p.order_ref
        WHERE o.product_area = 'checkout'
          AND o.order_time >= TIMESTAMP '2026-03-01'
          AND o.order_time < TIMESTAMP '2026-04-01'
        GROUP BY o.product_area

SELECT
          ua.state,
          count(DISTINCT p.user_ref) AS active_users
        FROM payments p
        JOIN users u ON p.user_ref = u.user_ref
        JOIN user_attributes ua ON u.user_ref = ua.user_ref
        WHERE p.payment_status = 'SUCCESS'
          AND ua.state = 'Rajasthan'
          AND p.payment_time >= TIMESTAMP '2026-04-01'
          AND p.payment_time < TIMESTAMP '2026-05-01'
        GROUP BY ua.state

WITH prior_users AS (
          SELECT DISTINCT p.user_ref
          FROM payments p
          WHERE p.payment_status = 'SUCCESS'
            AND p.payment_time < TIMESTAMP '2026-06-01' - INTERVAL 15 DAY
        ),
        recent_users AS (
          SELECT DISTINCT p.user_ref
          FROM payments p
          WHERE p.payment_status = 'SUCCESS'
            AND p.payment_time >= TIMESTAMP '2026-06-01' - INTERVAL 15 DAY
        )
        SELECT ua.risk_band, count(*) AS churned_users
        FROM prior_users pu
        JOIN user_attributes ua ON pu.user_ref = ua.user_ref
        LEFT JOIN recent_users ru ON pu.user_ref = ru.user_ref
        WHERE ru.user_ref IS NULL
          AND ua.risk_band = 'high'
        GROUP BY ua.risk_band

WITH txns AS (
          SELECT
            p.user_ref,
            date_trunc('month', p.payment_time) AS month,
            count(*) AS successful_txns
          FROM payments p
          JOIN users u ON p.user_ref = u.user_ref
          WHERE p.payment_status = 'SUCCESS'
            AND p.payment_time >= TIMESTAMP '2026-04-01'
            AND p.payment_time < TIMESTAMP '2026-07-01'
          GROUP BY p.user_ref, month
        )
        SELECT count(*) AS retained_users
        FROM (
          SELECT user_ref
          FROM txns
          GROUP BY user_ref
          HAVING sum(successful_txns) >= 10
             AND count(DISTINCT month) = 3
        ) retained

          sum(CASE WHEN p.payment_status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::DOUBLE / count(*) AS psr,
          count(*) AS attempts
        FROM payments p
        JOIN payment_attributes pa ON p.rail_ref = pa.rail_ref
        WHERE pa.rail_type = 'NEFT'
          AND p.payment_time >= TIMESTAMP '2026-01-01'
          AND p.payment_time < TIMESTAMP '2026-02-01'
        GROUP BY pa.rail_type

SELECT
          ua.state,
          count(DISTINCT p.user_ref) AS active_users
        FROM payments p
        JOIN users u ON p.user_ref = u.user_ref
        JOIN user_attributes ua ON u.user_ref = ua.user_ref
        WHERE p.payment_status = 'SUCCESS'
          AND ua.state = 'Karnataka'
          AND p.payment_time >= TIMESTAMP '2026-01-01'
          AND p.payment_time < TIMESTAMP '2026-02-01'
        GROUP BY ua.state

SELECT
          o.product_area,
          count(DISTINCT o.order_ref) AS orders_created,
          count(DISTINCT p.payment_ref) AS payment_attempts,
          count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.payment_status = 'SUCCESS' THEN p.payment_ref END) AS successful_payments
        FROM orders o
        LEFT JOIN payments p ON o.order_ref = p.order_ref
        WHERE o.product_area = 'subscriptions'

          AND o.order_time < TIMESTAMP '2026-02-01'

SELECT

          count(*) AS total_payments,
          sum(CASE WHEN p.payment_status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::DOUBLE / nullif(count(*), 0) AS psr
        FROM payments p
        JOIN orders o ON p.order_ref = o.order_ref
        JOIN user_attributes ua ON p.user_ref = ua.user_ref
        JOIN users u ON p.user_ref = u.user_ref
        JOIN payment_attributes pa ON p.rail_ref = pa.rail_ref
        WHERE p.payment_time >= TIMESTAMP '2026-03-01'
          AND p.payment_time < TIMESTAMP '2026-04-01'
          AND ua.risk_band = 'low'
          AND ua.state = 'Karnataka'
          AND ua.kyc_status = 'verified'
          AND u.account_state = 'active'
        GROUP BY o.checkout_surface, pa.authentication_mode
        HAVING count(*) >= 5
        ORDER BY tpv DESC

WITH txns AS (
          SELECT
            p.user_ref,
            date_trunc('month', p.payment_time) AS month,
            count(*) AS successful_txns
          FROM payments p
          JOIN users u ON p.user_ref = u.user_ref
          WHERE p.payment_status = 'SUCCESS'
            AND p.payment_time >= TIMESTAMP '2026-04-01'
            AND p.payment_time < TIMESTAMP '2026-07-01'
          GROUP BY p.user_ref, month
        )
        SELECT count(*) AS retained_users
        FROM (
          SELECT user_ref
          FROM txns
          GROUP BY user_ref
          HAVING sum(successful_txns) >= 10
             AND count(DISTINCT month) = 3
        ) retained

WITH prior_users AS (
          SELECT DISTINCT p.user_ref
          FROM payments p
          WHERE p.payment_status = 'SUCCESS'
            AND p.payment_time < TIMESTAMP '2026-06-01' - INTERVAL 15 DAY
        ),
        recent_users AS (
          SELECT DISTINCT p.user_ref
          FROM payments p
          WHERE p.payment_status = 'SUCCESS'
            AND p.payment_time >= TIMESTAMP '2026-06-01' - INTERVAL 15 DAY
        )
        SELECT ua.risk_band, count(*) AS churned_users
        FROM prior_users pu
        JOIN user_attributes ua ON pu.user_ref = ua.user_ref
        LEFT JOIN recent_users ru ON pu.user_ref = ru.user_ref
        WHERE ru.user_ref IS NULL
          AND ua.risk_band = 'medium'
        GROUP BY ua.risk_band

          sum(CASE WHEN p.payment_status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::DOUBLE / count(*) AS psr,
          count(*) AS attempts
        FROM payments p
        JOIN payment_attributes pa ON p.rail_ref = pa.rail_ref
        WHERE pa.rail_type = 'DC'
          AND p.payment_time >= TIMESTAMP '2026-01-01'
          AND p.payment_time < TIMESTAMP '2026-02-01'
        GROUP BY pa.rail_type

SELECT
          o.checkout_surface,
          pa.authentication_mode,
          sum(CASE WHEN p.payment_status = 'SUCCESS' THEN p.amount ELSE 0 END) AS tpv,
          sum(CASE WHEN p.payment_status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS successful_payments,
          count(*) AS total_payments,
          sum(CASE WHEN p.payment_status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::DOUBLE / nullif(count(*), 0) AS psr
        FROM payments p
        JOIN orders o ON p.order_ref = o.order_ref
        JOIN user_attributes ua ON p.user_ref = ua.user_ref
        JOIN users u ON p.user_ref = u.user_ref
        JOIN payment_attributes pa ON p.rail_ref = pa.rail_ref
        WHERE p.payment_time >= TIMESTAMP '2026-02-01'
          AND p.payment_time < TIMESTAMP '2026-03-01'
          AND ua.risk_band = 'medium'
          AND ua.state = 'Telangana'
          AND ua.kyc_status = 'verified'
          AND u.account_state = 'active'
        GROUP BY o.checkout_surface, pa.authentication_mode
        HAVING count(*) >= 5
        ORDER BY tpv DESC

SELECT
          ua.state,
          count(DISTINCT p.user_ref) AS active_users
        FROM payments p
        JOIN users u ON p.user_ref = u.user_ref
        JOIN user_attributes ua ON u.user_ref = ua.user_ref
        WHERE p.payment_status = 'SUCCESS'
          AND ua.state = 'Karnataka'
          AND p.payment_time >= TIMESTAMP '2026-04-01'
          AND p.payment_time < TIMESTAMP '2026-05-01'
        GROUP BY ua.state

WITH prior_users AS (
          SELECT DISTINCT p.user_ref
          FROM payments p
          WHERE p.payment_status = 'SUCCESS'
            AND p.payment_time < TIMESTAMP '2026-06-01' - INTERVAL 15 DAY
        ),
        recent_users AS (
          SELECT DISTINCT p.user_ref
          FROM payments p
          WHERE p.payment_status = 'SUCCESS'
            AND p.payment_time >= TIMESTAMP '2026-06-01' - INTERVAL 15 DAY
        )
        SELECT ua.risk_band, count(*) AS churned_users
        FROM prior_users pu
        JOIN user_attributes ua ON pu.user_ref = ua.user_ref
        LEFT JOIN recent_users ru ON pu.user_ref = ru.user_ref
        WHERE ru.user_ref IS NULL
          AND ua.risk_band = 'high'
        GROUP BY ua.risk_band

          SELECT DISTINCT p.user_ref
          FROM payments p
          WHERE p.payment_status = 'SUCCESS'
            AND p.payment_time < TIMESTAMP '2026-06-01' - INTERVAL 15 DAY
        ),
        recent_users AS (
          SELECT DISTINCT p.user_ref
          FROM payments p
          WHERE p.payment_status = 'SUCCESS'
            AND p.payment_time >= TIMESTAMP '2026-06-01' - INTERVAL 15 DAY
        )
        SELECT ua.risk_band, count(*) AS churned_users
        FROM prior_users pu
        JOIN user_attributes ua ON pu.user_ref = ua.user_ref
        LEFT JOIN recent_users ru ON pu.user_ref = ru.user_ref
        WHERE ru.user_ref IS NULL
          AND ua.risk_band = 'high'
        GROUP BY ua.risk_band

            AND p.payment_time < TIMESTAMP '2026-06-01'
          GROUP BY p.user_ref, month

        SELECT count(*) AS retained_users
        FROM (

          GROUP BY user_ref
          HAVING sum(successful_txns) >= 10
